about: Undergraduate ECE student at the National Technical University of Athens. Focus on algorithms, complexity, and quantum computing. Experienced in C++ and MATLAB with strong mathematics and programming background. Active member of the IEEE NTUA Student Branch Computer Society. Aspiring to pursue an academic research career in quantum algorithms and computational complexity.

items.title: National Technical University of Athens
items.subtitle: Diploma in Electrical and Computer Engineering (Integrated Master’s)
items.description:
Minors: Computer Software, Computer Systems, Bioengineering
Selected Coursework: Algorithms & Complexity, Fundamentals of Computer Science, Quantum Mechanics, Computer Programming

items.title: Research on Decision Tree and Quantum Query Complexity
items.subtitle: Advisor: Prof. Leonardos • National Technical University of Athens
items.description:
Investigating the randomized query complexity of decision trees utilizing k-threshold gates.
Currently analyzing the complexity of Recursive Majority functions.

items.title: Laboratory Teaching Assistant: Computer Programming
items.subtitle: National Technical University of Athens (NTUA)
items.description: Mentored first year undergraduate students in the fundamentals of computer programming and algorithmic thinking.

items.title: Private Tutor: Mathematics & Physics
items.description:
Delivered tutoring in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry for students aged 12-18.
Adapted complex concepts into accessible lessons to improve student performance in standardized exams.

items.title: IEEE NTUA Student Branch
items.subtitle: Member, Computer Society, Quantum Computing & Machine Learning Chapter
items.description:
Organizing technical workshops and seminars to promote engagement with Machine Learning and Quantum Computing concepts.
Contributing to small scale projects, focusing on the curation of custom datasets and model implementation and the communication of quantum computing concepts to peers.

items.title: National Physics Competition Aristotle – Honorable Mention
items.subtitle: NKUA & HPSEE

items.title: 30th and 31st Panhellenic Student Competition in Informatics
items.subtitle: Hellenic Society for Informatics

items.title: 2nd Student Conference on Research and Science
items.subtitle: NCSR Demokritos

items.title: National Student Competition in Mathematics – 3rd Prize
items.subtitle: Hellenic Mathematical Society
